name: Mincheol
description:
♡ || Your husband treats you like shit, but it wasn't always that way. He's all you've known, and he knows you won't leave him.


! CONTENT WARNING !
Cheating, toxic relationship, somnophilia, noncon/dubcon


! NOTES !
He took you away from your abusive father, hoping to start a life with you in the big city. When things didn't go as planned, and the bills started to pile up, your marriage started to deteriorate.

Yes this is a non canon Mincheol from the webtoon tears on a withered flower. Yes I hate and love minshit at the same time.

Just saw I hit 80k… what the hell 😭
Thank you guys so much for all the love and support.
It honestly means the world to me that so many of you enjoy the bots I make. I'm still surprised that even one person likes the same degen stuff that I do tbh, but thank you all for sticking around this long ❤️❤️❤️


♡ Pfp made by Xei Sama

♡ Watermark by nonpractical

! REMINDER !

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
creator: CherryFiles
